title: 9PCS Toy Inspired Story Foil Balloons, Toy Theme Story Birthday Decorations Cartoon Foil Balloons, Party Supplies for Boys Girls Happy Birthday Party Decorations
features: 🥳【Cartoon Theme Balloon Set】You will receive 9 pieces of foil themed balloons in different colors. Package includes: 1 * Star and Stripe Foil Balloon, 2 * Round Foil Balloon, 2 * Solid Color Star Foil Balloon, 2 * Patterned Star Foil Balloon, 2 * Cartoon Character Foil Balloon.

👍【High Quality Material】Birthday decorations balloons are made of 100% non-toxic and durable materials. Lightweight, not easy to burst, durable and reusable, can help you create a unique and super cool party!

🎉【Creative Theme Design】Using Interesting patterns as the background color of balloons will definitely attract children's attention. Surprise children's parties and add joy to both children and adults' parties.

✨【Easy to Use】Our party balloons can be filled with air or helium, then tighten the balloon with a ribbon and let it float in the air or stick the foil balloons on the wall or window, etc., which can well enhance the atmosphere of children's or adult birthday parties.

🧡【Perfect Party Decoration】This birthday party decorations set is suitable for children's birthday parties, cartoon parties, holiday parties, theme parties, children's games, classroom parties, family gatherings, celebrations, and decorations, which can bring you an unforgettable party experience!
description: Do you want to prepare a unique birthday party for your child? 1. Themed party with cartoon pattern gives you a unique birthday experience 2. The birthday decoration is made of high quality environmental protection material, non-toxic and non-irritating, can be used with confidence. 3. Decorative party decorations are perfect for children's birthday parties, baby shower, home decorations, family parties etc Package includes: 1 * Star and Stripe Foil Balloon; 2 * Round Foil Balloon; 2 * Solid Color Star Foil Balloon; 2 * Patterned Star Foil Balloon; 2 * Cartoon Character Foil Balloon How to use: 1. Find the valve with a transparent film and open the inflation tab. 2. Insert a straw or air pump into the valve. 3. Slowly inflate the balloon to 80%-90% full. Note: Do not over-inflate the balloon and avoid friction with sharp objects.
